other_observers: Joey Kellner, Dick Shottler, Ric Olson, Andrew Spencer; Fred Fisher, the home owner discovered the bird on the 16th. He is the orignal finder, and the only other observer as far as I know.
description: A black wood warbler with white wing patches and a bright red oval patch from belly to mid-breast. White crescent below each eye, some white in vent and under-tail and white outer retrices.Behaviors: The birds was clinging to siding and other porus vertical serfaces of a house while searching for insects.Call: nonePlumage: adult
photographer: Photographer: Glenn Walbek, Glenn Walbek, Glenn Walbek
